<!-- ================================================================
     New column for [[AVN Awards]] table — 2026 (43rd AVN Awards)
     Add the following header to the year row:
     ![[43rd AVN Awards|2026]]
     Then add these cells in order (one per category row):
     ================================================================ -->
<!-- Best New Starlet -->
|Cheerleader Kait
<!-- Female Performer of the Year -->
|[[Jennifer White (pornographic film actress)|Jennifer White]]
<!-- Male Performer of the Year -->
|Vince Karter
<!-- Trans Performer of the Year -->
|Aubrey Kate
<!-- Best Male Newcomer -->
|Axel Haze
<!-- Best Actress – Featurette -->
|[[Valentina Nappi]], “Shamanologist”{{spaced ndash}} ''Hentaied.pro''
<!-- Best Actor – Featurette -->
|[[Tommy Pistol]], “Mr. Sicko and the Little Lady”{{spaced ndash}} ''Sex and Submission/Kink''
<!-- Best Leading Actress -->
|Ryan Reid{{spaced ndash}} ''Deadly Vows, [[Digital Playground]]''
<!-- Best Leading Actor -->
|[[Tommy Pistol]]{{spaced ndash}} ''Strip, Dorcel/Pulse''
<!-- Best Supporting Actress -->
|Chloe Surreal{{spaced ndash}} ''Mind Games, Digital Playground/Pulse''
<!-- Best Supporting Actor -->
|Ken Feels{{spaced ndash}} ''Once Upon a Time in the Valley, [[Wicked Pictures]]''
<!-- International Female Performer of the Year -->
|Eve Sweet
<!-- International Male Performer of the Year -->
|Marcello Bravo
<!-- Outstanding Directing - Individual Work -->
|Ricky Greenwood{{spaced ndash}} ''Deadly Vows, [[Digital Playground]]''
<!-- Best Directing Portfolio – Narrative -->
|Ricky Greenwood
<!-- Best Directing Portfolio – Non-Narrative -->
|Jonni Darkko
<!-- Best Directing Portfolio – International -->
|Julia Grandi
<!-- Best Boy/Girl Sex Scene -->
|Chanel Camryn & Milan Ponjevic, “Midnight Movie”{{spaced ndash}} ''If It Feels Good 5, Deeper/Pulse''
<!-- Best Girl/Girl Sex Scene -->
|Miss B Nasty & [[Kira Noir]], “Domming Her Husband’s Side Piece”{{spaced ndash}} ''Hot and Mean 38, Brazzers/Pulse''
<!-- Best All-Girl Group Sex Scene -->
|[[Jennifer White (pornographic film actress)|Jennifer White]], [[Anna Claire Clouds]], [[Vanna Bardot]], Blake Blossom, Lilly Bell, [[Octavia Red]] & [[Jewelz Blu]], “Performers of the Year 2025: Lesbian Orgy”{{spaced ndash}} ''[[Elegant Angel]]''
<!-- Most Outrageous Sex Scene -->
|[[Valentina Nappi]], “Shamanologist” (or “We Have Such Sights to Show You”){{spaced ndash}} ''Hentaied.pro''
<!-- MILF Performer of the Year -->
|[[Lexi Luna]]
<!-- Best All-Girl Series or Free-Form Line -->
|''TBA''
<!-- Best MILF/Female Mixed-Age Series or Free-Form Line -->
|''TBA''
<!-- Best International Production -->
|''TBA''
<!-- Mark Stone Award for Outstanding Comedy -->
|Her Best Friend’s Dad{{spaced ndash}} ''Sweet Sinner/Mile High/Pulse''
<!-- Best Web Retail Store -->
|AdultEmpire.com
